name: Alpaca Finance
special_mechanism_summary: Alpaca Finance offers leveraged yield farming — users borrow from Alpaca lending vaults (ibTokens with ERC-4626-style exchange rate appreciation) to open leveraged LP positions on PancakeSwap at 3–6x. The Automated Vault (Alpaca 2.0) manages leveraged positions with auto-rebalancing, and Alpaca's own liquidation engine handles undercollateralized leveraged positions.
notes: C3' combination potential: undercollateralized leveraged farming creates a recursive capital structure where a single borrow enables 3-6x LP, and ibToken exchange rates are externally readable — a flash loan temporarily reducing ibToken exchange rate could trigger mass liquidations of leveraged positions; liquidation cascade trigger is modelable by monitoring ibToken rates and PancakeSwap LP prices together.
